3275000.name: Silent Howl
3275000.description:
In Silent Howl, every night is a fight for survival. A group of Villagers tries to unmask the dangerous Werewolves hiding among them, ready to strike from the shadows. But beware – not everyone is what they seem. Powerful hidden roles can shatter the fragile balance between daylight and the terrors of the night. Will you outsmart the deception and save the village... or devour it from within?

Game Modes:

  • Online Multiplayer: Face off against friends or players worldwide in intense matches where every decision seals your fate.

  • Unique Roles: Play as characters with special abilities. Become the Witch, the Assassin, the Werewolf, and many more. Each role uniquely impacts the game, whether by protecting, manipulating, or eliminating your enemies.

  • Phase Management:

    • By day, debate and vote to banish a suspect.

    • By night, special roles and Werewolves wake and act in secret. Can you convince others of your innocence—or sow doubt to divert suspicion?

Key Features:

  • Social Strategy: In Silent Howl, your skills in persuasion, deduction, and bluffing are your greatest weapons. Use them to deceive rivals or uncover the truth.

  • Diverse Roles: More than just Villagers vs. Werewolves, Silent Howl offers many unique roles, creating dynamic, unpredictable matches.

  • Immersive Atmosphere: Lose yourself in a mysterious world with detailed visuals and an enchanting soundtrack that heightens the tension at every turn.

  • High-Stakes Voting: During the day, every vote is critical. Who will you accuse? Who can you trust? Shift the balance with temporary alliances... or calculated betrayals.

Join the Hunt:

By day, trust no one. By night, only the cunning survive. Do you have what it takes to outmaneuver your foes—or will doubt lead to your downfall? In Silent Howl, every word matters, and every choice can alter the game’s fate.

Will you survive the night... or be the next victim?
3275000.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 韩语, 日语, 泰语
